[2025-12-19 02:38:33.307] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0
--- Injecting Values ---

Found assignment to replace: freq = 55;
Found assignment to replace: qFactor = 2.00;
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 2; // Injected

@init
freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 2; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;


---------------------

[2025-12-19 02:38:51.630] [CRITICAL] [DSP] LiveProg Compilation FAILED. Error Code: 1
--- Injecting Values ---

Found assignment to replace: freq = 55;
Found assignment to replace: qFactor = 2.00;
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 2.6074; // Injected

@init
freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 2.6074; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 8.1019; // Injected

@init
freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 8.1019; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;

    _b2 = z;

    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;

desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 7642.36; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

@init
freq = 7642.36; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

[2025-12-19 02:38:55.424] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.0120964
[2025-12-19 02:38:55.425] [CRITICAL] [DSP] LiveProg Compilation FAILED. Error Code: 1
--- Injecting Values ---

Found assignment to replace: freq = 55;
Found assignment to replace: qFactor = 2.00;
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 8831.17; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

@init
freq = 8831.17; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

--- Injecting Values ---

Found assignment to replace: freq = 55;
Found assignment to replace: qFactor = 2.00;
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 9270.73; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

@init
freq = 9270.73; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq = 8451.55; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

@init
freq = 8451.55; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample

spl1 += avg;

    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample

spl1 += avg;

    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;

[2025-12-19 20:49:10.839] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.256573
[2025-12-19 20:49:12.853] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.210651
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: freq:55<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:55<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 55; // Injected
qFactor = 2; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;


---------------------

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;

    _b2 = z;

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

freq:9820.18<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:10<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 9820.18; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:5214.79<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:10<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5214.79; // Injected
qFactor = 10; // Injected

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:250<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 250; // Injected
qFactor = 2; // Injected

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

--- Result Script ---
desc: Time adjustment (delay)
//tags: delay

slider1:0<-100,100,.1>Delay amount (ms)
slider2:0<-120,12,1>Wet mix (dB)
slider3:-120<-120,12,1>Dry mix (dB)
slider4:0<-40000,40000,1>Additional delay amount (samples)

@init
bpos=0;

slider1 = 0;
slider2 = 0; // Injected
slider3 = -120; // Injected
slider4 = 0; // Injected

wet=2^(slider2/6);
dry=2^(slider3/6);
delaylen = (slider1*srate*0.001 + slider4)|0;
delaylen<0?(
  pdc_delay=-delaylen;  
  pdc_top_ch=2;
  pdc_bot_ch=0;
  delaylen=0;
):(
delaylen+=pdc_delay;
//pdc_delay=0;
);
bufsize=srate*4.0; // extra in case the user wants to go over

@sample
bpos[0]=spl0;
bpos[1]=spl1;

rdpos=bpos-delaylen*2;
rdpos<0 ? rdpos+=bufsize*2;
spl0=spl0*dry+rdpos[0]*wet;
spl1=spl1*dry+rdpos[1]*wet;

bpos+=2;
bpos>=bufsize*2 ? bpos=0;

[2025-12-19 20:49:55.057] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.320827
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

--- Result Script ---
desc: Butterworth 8 bands (Equalization example)

//tags: iir

@init
iirBPS = 0;
reqSize = IIRBandSplitterInit(iirBPS, srate, 180, 800, 1600, 2700, 5600, 6500, 10000);
iirBPS2 = iirBPS + reqSize; // Shift the pointer
reqSize = IIRBandSplitterInit(iirBPS2, srate, 180, 800, 1600, 2700, 5600, 6500, 10000);
subbandLeft = iirBPS2 + reqSize; // Subband temp buffer, shift pointer again
subbandRight = subbandLeft + 8; // Subband temp buffer, shift pointer again, subbandLeft has 8 elements
eqGain = subbandRight + 8; // Shift pointer again, subbandRight has 8 elements
eqGain[0] = 1;
eqGain[1] = 0;
eqGain[2] = 1;
eqGain[3] = 1;
eqGain[4] = 0;
eqGain[5] = 1;
eqGain[6] = 0;
eqGain[7] = 1;

@sample
IIRBandSplitterProcess(iirBPS, spl0, subbandLeft[0], subbandLeft[1], subbandLeft[2], subbandLeft[3], subbandLeft[4], subbandLeft[5], subbandLeft[6], subbandLeft[7]);
IIRBandSplitterProcess(iirBPS2, spl1, subbandRight[0], subbandRight[1], subbandRight[2], subbandRight[3], subbandRight[4], subbandRight[5], subbandRight[6], subbandRight[7]);
sumLeft = 0;
sumRight = 0;
i = 0;
loop(8, 
subbandLeft[i] *= eqGain[i];
subbandRight[i] *= eqGain[i];
sumLeft += subbandLeft[i];
sumRight += subbandRight[i];
i += 1);
spl0 = sumLeft;
spl1 = sumRight;

[2025-12-19 20:55:14.831] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.41526
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: freq:55<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:55<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 55;
qFactor = 2;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;

    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;

    _b2 = z;

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;

);

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

@init

qFactor = 2;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;

    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

qFactor:8.3017<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5784.22;
qFactor = 8.3017;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:4.9051<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:5784.22<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:4.9051<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5784.22;
qFactor = 4.9051;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

@init
freq = 5784.22;
qFactor = 1.7083;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

qFactor = 5.4046;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:6.8032<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:5784.22<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:6.8032<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5784.22;
qFactor = 6.8032;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

desc: Low-pass filter

freq:5784.22<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:8.002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5784.22;
qFactor = 8.002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

freq:2827.18<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 2827.18;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:3946.06<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 3946.06;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

freq:4905.1<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency

@init
freq = 4905.1;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

freq = 4405.6;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample

spl1 += avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:5834.17<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5834.17;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;

    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:55<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:2<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 55;
qFactor = 2;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

@init
freq = 55;
qFactor = 2.1079;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;

    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;

    _b2 = z;

    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;

    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@init

qFactor = 10;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;

    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;

    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

[2025-12-19 21:00:01.980] [DEBUG] [DSP] LiveProg Content Loaded SUCCESS.
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: freq:9380.62<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:10<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: Low-pass filter
author: @thepbone
//tags: filter

freq:9380.62<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:10<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 9380.62;
qFactor = 10;

function LowPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = z;   
    _b1 = 1.f - cosX;   
    _b2 = z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

lowpass.LowPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = lowpass.LowPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 += avg;
spl1 += avg;

Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:250<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:2.3077<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 250;
qFactor = 2.3077;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:8.1019<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:250<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:8.1019<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 250;
qFactor = 8.1019;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:2417.59<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 2417.59;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: freq:5394.61<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:5394.61<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 5394.61;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

[2025-12-19 21:00:10.662] [DEBUG] [DSP] LiveProg Content Loaded SUCCESS.
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: freq:7412.59<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:7412.59<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 7412.59;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

Updated slider def: freq:8261.74<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
Updated slider def: qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor
Replaced assignment for: freq
Replaced assignment for: qFactor
--- Result Script ---
desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:8261.74<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 8261.74;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@sample
avg = highpass.HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(spl0 + spl1);
spl0 -= avg;
spl1 -= avg;

desc: High Pass Filter
//tags: filter

freq:8471.53<10,10000,1>Cut-off frequency
qFactor:9.8002<0.01,10,0.1>Q factor

@init
freq = 8471.53;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

highpass.HighPassFilter_Set(freq, qFactor);

@init
freq = 2647.36;
qFactor = 9.8002;

function HighPassFilter_Set(frequency qFactor)(
    x = (frequency * 2.f * $PI) / srate;
    sinX = sin(x);
    y = sinX / (qFactor * 2.f);
    cosX = cos(x);
    z = (1.f - cosX) / 2.f;
    
    _a0 = y + 1.f;
    _a1 = cosX * -2.f;
    _a2 = 1.f - y;
    _b0 = 1.f - z;   
    _b1 = cosX * -2.f;   
    _b2 = 1.f - z;   
    
    this.y_2 = 0; this.y_1 = 0; this.x_2 = 0; this.x_1 = 0;
    this.b0 = _b0 / _a0;
    this.b1 = _b1 / _a0;
    this.b2 = _b2 / _a0;
    this.a1 = -_a1 / _a0;
    this.a2 = -_a2 / _a0;
);

function HighPassFilter_ProcessSample(sample)(
    out = sample * this.b0 + this.x_1 * this.b1 + this.x_2 * this.b2 + this.y_1 * this.a1 + this.y_2 * this.a2;
    this.y_2 = this.y_1;
    this.y_1 = out;
    this.x_2 = this.x_1;
    this.x_1 = sample;
    
    out;
);

[2025-12-19 21:00:22.333] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 1
[2025-12-19 21:00:24.352] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 1
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: strength:800<0,1200>Strength
Replaced assignment for: strength
--- Result Script ---
desc: Depth surround
author: @thepbone
// reimplementation from v4a
//tags: surround

strength:800<0,1200>Strength

@init
strength = 800;

function DepthSurround_Init() (
    req = fractionalDelayLineInit(this.delay0, 256);
    ptr1 = ptr1 + req;
    req = fractionalDelayLineInit(this.delay1, 256);
    
    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay0, 20);
    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay1, 140);
);

function DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength) (
    this.strength = strength;
    this.over500 = strength >= 500;
    this.enabled = strength != 0;
    _gain = pow(10.f,((strength / 1000.f) * 10.f - 15.f) / 20.f);
    abs(_gain) > 1.f ? (
        _gain = 1.f;
    );
    this.gain = _gain;
);

function DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(left right) (
    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (
        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedL() (
    this.outL;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedR() (
    this.outR;
);

depth.DepthSurround_Init();
depth.DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength);

@sample
depth.DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(spl0, spl1);
spl0 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedL();
spl1 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedR();



---------------------

    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay0, 20);
    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay1, 140);
);

function DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength) (
    this.strength = strength;
    this.over500 = strength >= 500;
    this.enabled = strength != 0;
    _gain = pow(10.f,((strength / 1000.f) * 10.f - 15.f) / 20.f);
    abs(_gain) > 1.f ? (
        _gain = 1.f;
    );
    this.gain = _gain;
);

function DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(left right) (
    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (
        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedL() (
    this.outL;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedR() (
    this.outR;
);

depth.DepthSurround_Init();
depth.DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength);

@sample
depth.DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(spl0, spl1);
spl0 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedL();
spl1 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedR();

    this.over500 = strength >= 500;
    this.enabled = strength != 0;
    _gain = pow(10.f,((strength / 1000.f) * 10.f - 15.f) / 20.f);
    abs(_gain) > 1.f ? (
        _gain = 1.f;
    );
    this.gain = _gain;
);

function DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(left right) (
    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (
        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedL() (
    this.outL;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedR() (
    this.outR;
);

depth.DepthSurround_Init();
depth.DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength);

@sample
depth.DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(spl0, spl1);
spl0 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedL();
spl1 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedR();

        _gain = 1.f;
    );
    this.gain = _gain;
);

function DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(left right) (
    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (
        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedL() (
    this.outL;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedR() (
    this.outR;
);

depth.DepthSurround_Init();
depth.DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength);

@sample
depth.DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(spl0, spl1);

spl1 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedR();

        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;

    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;

    this.over500 = strength >= 500;
    this.enabled = strength != 0;

        _gain = 1.f;
    );

    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (

    this.outL;
);

Updated slider def: strength:1131.6<0,1200>Strength
Replaced assignment for: strength
--- Result Script ---
desc: Depth surround
author: @thepbone
// reimplementation from v4a
//tags: surround

strength:1131.6<0,1200>Strength

@init
strength = 1131.6;

function DepthSurround_Init() (
    req = fractionalDelayLineInit(this.delay0, 256);
    ptr1 = ptr1 + req;
    req = fractionalDelayLineInit(this.delay1, 256);
    
    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay0, 20);
    fractionalDelayLineSetDelay(this.delay1, 140);
);

function DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength) (
    this.strength = strength;
    this.over500 = strength >= 500;
    this.enabled = strength != 0;
    _gain = pow(10.f,((strength / 1000.f) * 10.f - 15.f) / 20.f);
    abs(_gain) > 1.f ? (
        _gain = 1.f;
    );
    this.gain = _gain;
);

function DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(left right) (
    _gain = this.gain;
    this.over500 ? (
        _gain = -this.gain;
    );
                  
    this.prev0 = this.gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay0, left + this.prev1);
    this.prev1 = _gain * fractionalDelayLineProcess(this.delay1, right + this.prev0);

    this.outL = this.prev0 + sampleLeft;
    this.outR = this.prev1 + sampleRight;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedL() (
    this.outL;
);

function DepthSurround_GetProcessedR() (
    this.outR;
);

depth.DepthSurround_Init();
depth.DepthSurround_SetStrength(strength);

@sample
depth.DepthSurround_ProcessSamples(spl0, spl1);
spl0 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedL();
spl1 = depth.DepthSurround_GetProcessedR();

--- Result Script ---
desc: Stereo widener
//width:2<0,6,0.1>Stereo Width
//reimplemented from: https://www.musicdsp.org/en/latest/Effects/256-stereo-width-control-obtained-via-transfromation-matrix.html
//tags: stereo

@init
width = 2;

@sample
coef_S = width * 0.5;

m = (spl0 + spl1) * 0.5;
s = (spl1 - spl0) * coef_S;

spl0 = m - s;
spl1 = m + s;

[2025-12-19 21:00:33.812] [DEBUG] [DSP] LiveProg Content Loaded SUCCESS.
[2025-12-19 21:00:34.411] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 1
[2025-12-19 21:00:36.422] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.845374
[2025-12-19 21:00:38.429] [DEBUG] [DSP] Processing Active. Max Amp: 0.552061
--- Injecting Values (Preserving Syntax) ---

Updated slider def: dBassGain:100<0,100,1>Bass strength (%)
Updated slider def: dX1:800<0,8000,1>Filter 1 Minimum frequency (Hz)
Updated slider def: dX2:6200<0,8000,1>Filter 1 Maximum frequency (Hz)
Updated slider def: dSideGainX:20<0,100,1>Filter 1 Side gain
Updated slider def: dY1:80<0,8000,1>Filter 2 Minimum frequency (Hz)
Updated slider def: dY2:140<0,8000,1>Filter 2 Maximum frequency (Hz)
Updated slider def: dSideGainY:0<0,100,1>Filter 2 Side gain
Replaced assignment for: dBassGain
